content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”destination-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”flexone”][vc_custom_heading text=”Jodhpur Destination Wedding Packages”][vc_column_text]Rajasthan and the destination weddings that have become an intrinsic part of the state are mystifying. Rajasthan, with its heritage hotels and luxury buildings, has much to offer not only leisure travelers but also modern couples. Along with this, if you get an amazing offer of Jodhpur Destination Wedding Packages, then this is not more than a relief. Jodhpur combines the allure of royal palaces and heritage Havelis with the beauty of natural decor that is intricately woven with Rajasthan’s colors and flavors.

We’re here to help you make this and all other wedding fantasies a reality. We’ve gathered a selection of top venues in Jodhpur that showcase elegance and comfort at their finest in this blog.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips for Destination Wedding in Jodhpur”][vc_column_text]You must have a clear understanding of how much money you have to spend and which aspects are most important to you. If you don’t want to make any concessions on the photos, you may have to make some concessions on the costly décor.

Organizing a Destination Wedding in Jodhpur with a lower guest list is a chore that is practically manageable in practice. However, if you intend to host a large number of guests, you might consider hiring a wedding planner.

Stay in the same place and book events at the same time. This will help you avoid having to transport individuals from one location to another. Aside from that, if you book a single location for both your stay and your wedding events, you are more likely to receive a better deal.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the cost of the Jodhpur Destination Wedding package?”][vc_column_text]

In general, preparing a wedding in Rajasthan costs between INR 3 and 30 lakhs on average, with a guest list of approximately 150 persons, depending on the services and facilities offered. The typical cost of organizing a Jodhpur Destination Wedding cost varies according to a variety of variables.

Venue
The only thing that significantly influences your budget is determining whether or not to host the Wedding venues in Jodhpur with price and accommodate the guests in the same location. If it is not possible to accommodate visitors at the function venue, book a hotel close by.

Days
It is recommended that you arrange a maximum of three days of wedding celebrations if you do not desire to drastically increase your wedding expenditure.

List of Guests
The fewer guests, the better. After all, destination weddings are meant to be intimate affairs attended by just close friends and family.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Best place for Destination Wedding in Jodhpur”][vc_column_text]There are many places where we can arrange for the superior wedding in Jodhpur. Here are a few of the best destination wedding places in Jodhpur picked for you:

Bhavan Ummaid
Umaid Bhawan is an ideal location for your destination wedding in Jodhpur. It is owned by Maharaja Gaj Singh and serves as the residence of the Jodhpur Royal Family. 64 rooms with private terraces and world-class service create an opulent atmosphere.

Indiana Palace
At Indiana Palace, there are 80 tastefully appointed guest rooms. Wedding locations include landscaped gardens and banquet halls. The party rooms are available for a variety of wedding celebrations.

Vivanta by Taj Hari Mahal
At Vivanta by Taj-Hari Mahal, your Destination Wedding will win hearts. 93 Charm Rooms and Temptation Suites draped in style and service should provide everything you require.

Chanwa Luni Fort
Maharaja Dalip Singhji owns Fort Chanwa Luni. 64 excellent rooms ensure that your guests are not disappointed. Allow the lovely courtyards and gardens to bring hearts together. Weddings are enhanced by decorated camels, low-table feasts, and fireworks.

Palace Ranabanka
Ranabanka was built in 1927 and is a timeless beauty for all your celebrations. 90 rooms distributed around the Jodhana Courtyard and Royal Apartments ensure a historically significant stay. Each wedding moment is memorable whether it takes place in the gardens, terraces, rooftop, or Rajput Hall.

You can relish these above best destination wedding venues in Jodhpur with a royal feel.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Which part of Jodhpur is best for a Destination Wedding?”][vc_column_text]

Jodhpur is known for its Royal Heritage. With all the beauty of nature and the kingdom, the palaces can be considered as the best part of Jodhpur for your destination wedding. Though the mentioned places are well known as few super wedding destinations in Rajasthan but to get a Royal experience, you may prefer a Palace Destination Wedding in Jodhpur with our best Jodhpur destination wedding packages.

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Best resorts to stay in Jodhpur for wedding ceremonies.”][vc_column_text]

Find some of the best destination wedding resorts in Jodhpur below:

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Welcome hotel Jodhpur”][vc_column_text]

The Welcomhotel Jodhpur is a palatial mirage with world-class amenities and 10 acres of beautifully maintained lawns. Located on the borders of the awe-inspiring Thar Desert, this stunning hotel is the perfect spot to rejuvenate.

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Jodhpur’s Taj Hari Mahal”][vc_column_text]

Make yourself at home in one of the 93 air-conditioned rooms. Private bathrooms with shower/tub combos come with complimentary toiletries. Phones, safes, and desks are all conveniences. Pamper yourself with a massage at the spa. You’ll love the outdoor pool, sauna, and 24-hour fitness center.

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Ratan Vilas”][vc_column_text]

Enjoy one of the 20 distinctively decorated guest rooms with minibars. You may stay connected with free wireless Internet and watch digital programming. Deep soaking baths and rain shower heads in private bathrooms

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”The Ummed Jodhpur Palace”][vc_column_text]

Enjoy Indian food in one of the hotel’s two restaurants, Charbagh, or order room service 24 hours a day. The coffee shop/café also serves snacks. These are also the supreme destination Wedding Locations in Jodhpur.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text]

FAQs about Jodhpur Wedding Destination

How much does a destination wedding in Jodhpur cost?
The average cost of a destination wedding in Jodhpur is between Rs. 3 lakh and Rs. 50 lakh, assuming a guest list of approximately 150 guests.
When is the Best Time to get married in Jodhpur?
Summers in Jodhpur can be intolerable and should be avoided. Between November and February is the finest time to organize wedding activities here.
How do I plan a Destination Wedding in Jodhpur?
Plan a perfect destination wedding in Jodhpur with us along with all the amenities and luxury required without any hassle.
How much is an all-inclusive destination wedding?
The average cost of a destination wedding in Jodhpur is between Rs. 3 lakh and Rs. 50 lakh with a count of 150 guests and all the services included.
Do you pay for guests at destination weddings?
Yes, it’s a responsibility to pay for guests at destination weddings.
How do I Book a Venue or Resort for a Destination Wedding?
You can book a venue or resort for a destination wedding on the ATW Travels's website with amazing packages.
Do you organize only Weddings or other events as well?
We organize other events along with weddings.
Is a Destination Wedding being safe during the pandemic time?
Weddings during the pandemic time are risky. However, we follow all the protocols and essential safety measures.
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”stick-session” css=”.vc_custom_1645002142636{margin-top: 20px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”slider-sidebar”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg”][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646500114185{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text]
[/vc_column][/vc_row]
